caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair tied up and wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt is seated in a recording studio. She is positioned in front of a professional black microphone and is speaking, gesturing with her hands as she talks. In the background, there is a yellow wall and a dark acoustic panel. A screen displays the word "Johnson" in red letters, with smaller text above it that reads "Employee - Only". On-screen graphics include the logos "ROSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST", accompanied by smaller text stating "By: SL Logo Studio". Across the sequence, the woman shifts her expression and hand positions while continuing to speak into the microphone, transitioning from a slight smile and a raised hand to a more active speaking posture with her mouth open and hand gesturing closer to her chest.
